dataset_title: Protein–protein interactions in DNA repair dataset

fields.name: record_id
fields.description: Stable unique identifier for one protein‑protein interaction record.

fields.name: source_db
fields.description: Name of the source database (BioGRID, IntAct, MINT, etc.) from which the interaction was obtained.
fields.normalization_rule: Controlled vocabulary: use official database names.

fields.name: source_db_id
fields.description: Original interaction identifier assigned by the source database.

fields.name: protein_a_id
fields.description: UniProtKB accession number for the first protein.
fields.normalization_rule: Use canonical UniProt AC (e.g., P04637 for TP53).

fields.name: protein_b_id
fields.description: UniProtKB accession number for the second protein.
fields.normalization_rule: Use canonical UniProt AC (e.g., P38398 for BRCA1).

fields.name: protein_a_gene
fields.description: Official gene symbol for protein A, HGNC.

fields.name: protein_b_gene
fields.description: Official gene symbol for protein B, HGNC.

fields.name: protein_a_repair_pathways
fields.description: DNA repair pathway(s) associated with protein A. Multiple pathways separated by '|'.
fields.normalization_rule: Controlled vocabulary: BER, NER, HRR, NHEJ, MMR, TLS, DDS, DDR. Use '|' for multiple.

fields.name: protein_b_repair_pathways
fields.description: DNA repair pathway(s) associated with protein B according to REPAIRtoire. Multiple pathways separated by '|'.
fields.normalization_rule: Controlled vocabulary: BER, NER, HRR, NHEJ, MMR, TLS, DDS, DDR. Use '|' for multiple.

fields.name: interaction_type
fields.description: Molecular interaction type using PSI‑MI controlled vocabulary term.
fields.normalization_rule: Uses MI identifiers or their labels; prefer PSI‑MI terms.

fields.name: detection_method
fields.description: Experimental method used to detect the interaction (PSI‑MI term).
fields.normalization_rule: Use PSI‑MI ID or label; list only physical methods.

fields.name: interaction_confidence
fields.description: Confidence score provided by the source database (if available).

fields.name: pmid
fields.description: PubMed identifier of the publication reporting the interaction.

fields.name: taxid_a
fields.description: NCBI Taxonomy ID for the organism of protein A.
fields.normalization_rule: Use NCBI taxid (e.g., 9606 for Homo sapiens).

fields.name: taxid_b
fields.description: NCBI Taxonomy ID for the organism of protein B.
fields.normalization_rule: Use NCBI taxid (e.g., 9606 for Homo sapiens).

fields.name: interaction_context
fields.description: Biological context or tissue/cell line where the interaction was observed, free text.

fields.name: record_notes
fields.description: Curator notes, flags about data merging, or any additional remarks.
fields.example: Merged from BioGRID and IntAct; pathway assigned via REPAIRtoire mapping.
